name: China Gold International Resources Corp. Ltd.
description: China Gold International Resources Corp. Ltd. is a Canadian-based gold and base metals producer headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, listed on both the TSX and Hong Kong Stock Exchange (2099.HK). The company operates two producing mines in China: the Chang Shan Hao (CSH) open-pit heap-leach gold mine in Inner Mongolia, and the Jiama copper-gold polymetallic mine in the Tibet Autonomous Region, which also produces molybdenum, silver, lead, and zinc. China Gold is a subsidiary of China National Gold Group, the largest state-owned gold producer in China, and is firmly in the production stage.
